mapper.select:
SELECT PLC_NO AS plcNo, PLC_ID AS plcId, PLC_CAT_CD AS plcCatCd, PLC_NAME AS plcName, PLC_OVERVIEW AS plcOverview, PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL AS plcMainImgUrl FROM PLACE WHERE PLC_RGN_CD = #{regionCode} AND PLC_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CASE WHEN PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL IS NOT NULL AND PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL != '' AND PLC_OVERVIEW IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(PLC_OVERVIEW) != '' THEN 0
WHEN PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL IS NOT NULL AND PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL != '' THEN 1
ELSE 2 END, PLC_NO DESC

SELECT ranked.PLC_NO AS plcNo, ranked.PLC_ID AS plcId, ranked.PLC_CAT_CD AS plcCatCd, ranked.PLC_NAME AS plcName, ranked.PLC_OVERVIEW AS plcOverview, ranked.PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL AS plcMainImgUrl FROM ( SELECT P.PLC_NO, P.PLC_ID, P.PLC_CAT_CD, P.PLC_NAME, P.PLC_OVERVIEW, P.PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY P.PLC_CAT_CD ORDER BY COALESCE(P.PLC_AVG_RATING, 0) DESC, COALESCE(P.PLC_REVIEW_CNT, 0) DESC, CASE WHEN P.PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL IS NOT NULL AND P.PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL != '' AND P.PLC_OVERVIEW IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(P.PLC_OVERVIEW) != '' THEN 3
WHEN P.PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL IS NOT NULL AND P.PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL != '' THEN 2
ELSE 1 END DESC, RAND() ) AS rn FROM PLACE P WHERE P.PLC_RGN_CD = #{regionCode} AND P.PLC_USE_YN = 'Y' AND P.PLC_CAT_CD IN ('PLC001', 'PLC002', 'PLC003', 'PLC004') ) ranked WHERE ranked.rn = 1 ORDER BY FIELD(ranked.PLC_CAT_CD, 'PLC001', 'PLC002', 'PLC003', 'PLC004')
